title: Redstone Wire
description: It transports a redstone charge as-is over a hanging  redstone wire. Nothing more nothing less
body:
![Redstone Wire! Redstone in Redstone out! Easy!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/757b05152b544ffaac5dc8acdec196ee33fac1e0.png)

Transports a simple redstone charge as-is through a hanging redstone wire

1. Redstone levels are preserved (8 in -> 8 out)'
2. Redstone levels can be pushed up by adding a higher level to the network (8 in, 16 in -> 16 out)

## Usage

Connect input/output/connector blocks with redstone dust to create a wired connection.

> ```
>  Redstone Charge -> Input Block -> Redstone -> Connector -> Redstone -> Output Block -> Redstone Charge
> ```

## Maintainability

The idea is to keep things simple to keep this mod maximum maintainable / upgradable.

---

![Shows a redstone contraption where an redstone-input block is connected via multiple anntenae and hanging wires to a redstone-output block. Two active repeaters show that the input block receives the signal while the output block transmits it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98d258c85db5720ecf32012511b2a48e76a006c7.png)
